actions.deletionReviewTooltip: Deletion review preview (dry-run only, nothing is deleted)
actions.deletionReviewError: Failed to load the deletion review preview.

deletionReview.panelTitle: Deletion Review Preview (dry-run only — nothing was deleted)
deletionReview.footnote: Note: this is a dry-run preview, and there is no live/automated deletion endpoint in this release. Unclassified (no administrative-category distinction exists yet) attachments and clinical/imaging data cannot be deleted through this view until a future release adds a lifecycle-category enum and a request-workflow-bound deletion endpoint.
